notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Wyatt Langford singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Nicky Lopez scores. Wyatt Langford to 2nd. Wyatt Langford advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Wyatt Langford singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Nicky Lopez scores. Wyatt Langford to 2nd. Wyatt Langford advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio walks. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Wyatt Langford singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Nicky Lopez scores. Wyatt Langford to 2nd. Wyatt Langford advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson lines out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.

notableEvents.label: Michael Helman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Michael Helman hit by pitch. Cody Freeman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo flies out to left fielder Jarren Duran.
